name: Nebula Systems
notes:
- We are currently transitioning our domain from nebula-sys.com to nebulasystems.net.

- Effective October 3, 2025, we have achieved full implementation of RPKI validation for all routes received from our upstream providers and peers. We are actively dropping all BGP routes with an "Invalid" RPKI status. To ensure service continuity and proper route advertisement, we strongly recommend that you configure ROAs for your advertised prefixes within the respective RIR portals.

- We also rely on your IPv4 and IPv6 prefix counts on PeeringDB to set maximum prefix limits with our peers, so please ensure those are accurate.

- You can find our Geofeed (RFC8805) file here: [https://geofeed.nebulasystems.net/as147040-geofeed.csv](https://geofeed.nebulasystems.net/as147040-geofeed.csv)
